mission: After P dictionary, identify the pointwise residual term and factor it into amplitude times Eq231 geometry weight.
target_shape: pResidualWeight <= amplitude * pGeometryWeight and pGeometryWeight <= cmp116Eq231PWeight rate gapMass pBonds.
minimal_success: rate rho and bracket fields are explicit
does not claim entropy alone closes residual
reject_if: P dictionary is unresolved and silently assumed
pointwise residual is replaced by final summed bound
